title: delegation — settings
description: Tenant-facing preferences for role delegation lifecycle notifications + per-user delegation preferences.

groups.label: Delegation
groups.description: Tenant-wide delegation policy — window caps, notification behaviour, emergency-flow eligibility.

sections.label: Window policy
sections.description: Caps on delegation windows within this tenant. Cannot exceed the platform hard cap of 90 days.

fields.name: max_delegation_days
fields.label: Maximum delegation duration (days)
fields.helpText: Set below the platform cap if your compliance regime requires shorter windows.

fields.name: min_advance_notice_hours
fields.label: Minimum advance notice (hours)
fields.helpText: How far in advance a delegation must be created before it can activate. 0 = immediate. Emergency delegations bypass this if the tenant holds the emergency_delegation entitlement.

fields.name: emergency_type_available
fields.label: Allow emergency-type delegations
fields.helpText: Bypasses the min_advance_notice_hours check. Only requestable by users holding the emergency_delegation permission (default: admin + owner).

fields.name: notify_on_inbound_delegation
fields.label: Notify me when I receive a delegation
fields.helpText: You are always notified for delegation.activated (regulatory — cannot be disabled) but you can turn off the informational delegation.created notice here.

fields.name: notify_on_outbound_expiring
fields.label: Notify me 24h before my outbound delegation expires
